title: Newsletter Opt-Out Sync Failure
description: Customers who opt-out on the website are still receiving emails for up to 48 hours because the dim_customers PII flag isn't triggering the marketing API immediately.

title: Loyalty Program Attribution Gap
description: Points earned via the mobile app are not correctly linking to the web-based profile ID. Approximately 12% of users are seeing incorrect point balances.

title: Warehouse Stock Out-of-Sync
description: The dim_inventory table is only updating every 24 hours. Needs to be moved to a 4-hour micro-batch to prevent marketplace overselling.

title: Last-Mile Delivery Latency (Barcelona)
description: API latency in the carrier tracking dataset is causing a 4-hour delay in "Package Delivered" status updates. This is inflating the customer friction score.

title: Tax Compliance Export for LOPD
description: Need a dedicated view for the legal team to export anonymized transaction data for the Spanish Tax Agency.

title: Q4 Revenue Reconciliation Delay
description: Discrepancy between Stripe transaction logs and the local fact_sales table. Current pipeline doesn't account for mid-month currency fluctuations in the Madrid region.

title: What is driving the revenue gap vs. plan in Q4?
description: Revenue is tracking below the annual plan. Need to identify which categories and regions are underperforming.

title: Which customer segments have the highest return rate?
description: Returns are up YoY. Need segment-level breakdown to decide whether to tighten return policy for specific categories.

title: Is the marketplace channel profitable after fulfillment costs?
description: Marketplace revenue is growing but fulfillment costs are unclear. Need to model net margin per channel.
